name: Bloody Eyeballs on the Rocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare these bloody eyeballs the day before you plan to serve them. With an adult's help, peel 12 radishes, leaving thin streaks of red skin on them for blood vessels.
2. Using the tip of a vegetable peeler or small knife, carefully scoop out a small hole in each radish. Stuff a green olive (pimento side out) into each hole. Place one radish in each section of an empty ice cube tray.
3. Fill the tray with water and freeze overnight.
4. Pour tall glasses about 3/4 full of tomato juice and add a pair of eyeballs to each glass. Cheers! This is perfect for you!
